question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/health/ImporterLagHealthIndicator.java -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: health()] Can an unprivileged external user repeatedly invoke the publicly exposed Spring Boot Actuator /actuator/health endpoint to trigger a new Prometheus HTTP query on every call via prometheusClient.query(query), causing sustained CPU and network I/O amplification on the monitor node exceeding 30% above baseline without any authentication?
